title: Repair and replace vehicle structural damage
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Repair and replace vehicle structural damage demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to repair and replace vehicle structural damage

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Structural repair and replacement information is accessed and interpreted from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s specifications1.3 Materials for repair are selected and checked for quality1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to identify methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Structural repair and replacement information is accessed and interpreted from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s specifications1.3 Materials for repair are selected and checked for quality1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to identify methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Structural repair and replacement information is accessed and interpreted from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s specifications1.3 Materials for repair are selected and checked for quality1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to identify methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to repair and replace vehicle structural damage

elements.title: Carry out structural straightening, realigning and welding procedures

pcs.text: Damaged components are removed as required, according to OEM or authorised agency’s recommended procedures and equipment2.2 Components are straightened using OEM or authorised agency’s approved equipment and procedures2.3 Repaired or replacement components are fitted and aligned, and measurements are checked against OEM or authorised agency’s specifications2.4 Repaired or replaced components are welded according to OEM or authorised agency’s specifications, methods and equipment, and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Assistance is sought from authorised personnel where straightening, realigning and welding of components disturb vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Damaged components are removed as required, according to OEM or authorised agency’s recommended procedures and equipment2.2 Components are straightened using OEM or authorised agency’s approved equipment and procedures2.3 Repaired or replacement components are fitted and aligned, and measurements are checked against OEM or authorised agency’s specifications2.4 Repaired or replaced components are welded according to OEM or authorised agency’s specifications, methods and equipment, and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Assistance is sought from authorised personnel where straightening, realigning and welding of components disturb vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Damaged components are removed as required, according to OEM or authorised agency’s recommended procedures and equipment2.2 Components are straightened using OEM or authorised agency’s approved equipment and procedures2.3 Repaired or replacement components are fitted and aligned, and measurements are checked against OEM or authorised agency’s specifications2.4 Repaired or replaced components are welded according to OEM or authorised agency’s specifications, methods and equipment, and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Assistance is sought from authorised personnel where straightening, realigning and welding of components disturb vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out structural straightening, realigning and welding procedures

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and manufacturer specifications, and components are presented ready for painting3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored3.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and manufacturer specifications, and components are presented ready for painting3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored3.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and manufacturer specifications, and components are presented ready for painting3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored3.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
